legacy.content:
# Phase 31-01 Plan: Engine Canonical Exports + status(roomFeature)
## Objective
Make engine the single source of truth for actionType and roomFeature. Expose structured data so consumers do not parse prose.
## Tasks
1. **Engine exports** — Re-export from `@dungeonbreak/engine`: - `PLAYER_ACTION_TYPES`, `ROOM_FEATURES` (const arrays) - `PlayerActionType`, `RoomFeature` (types) - Add to `packages/engine/src/index.ts`
2. **status() roomFeature** — Add `roomFeature: string` to `engine.status()` return. Derive from `getRoom(dungeon, player.depth, player.roomId).feature`.
3. **AGENTS.md convention** — Add under Development priorities or new section: - Use `PLAYER_ACTION_TYPES`, `ROOM_FEATURES` (or `PlayerActionType`/`RoomFeature`) from `@dungeonbreak/engine`; no magic strings for actionType/roomFeature in kaplay-demo, engine-mcp, or docs-site.
4. **inRuneForgeContext** — Refactor `packages/kaplay-demo/src/scene-blocks.ts`: - Use `state.status?.roomFeature === "rune_forge"` (from engine status) - OR `itemsByActionType(state, PLAYER_ACTION_TYPES that map to rune_forge).length > 0` - Remove `state.look.toLowerCase().includes("rune")` prose parsing
5. **KAPLAY + engine-mcp** — Replace string literals with imports: - `firstItemByActionType(state, "fight")` → use constant - `itemsByActionType(state, "evolve_skill")` → use constant - intent-router, action-renderer, ui-context: import from engine
## Files
- `packages/engine/src/index.ts` - `packages/engine/src/escape-the-dungeon/engine/game.ts` (status) - `AGENTS.md` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/scene-blocks.ts` - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/action-renderer.ts`, `intent-router.ts`, `ui-context.ts` - `packages/engine-mcp/src/*` (agent-play, etc. — grep for action type strings)
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` passes - `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run build` passes - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run typecheck` passes - No prose-parsing for rune forge; roomFeature from status
